title: Buyer creates a PO and then approves it as a separate journey
user_persona: Buyer who has both create and approve rights and uses two separate flows

conversation.user: Quick PO for SUP-100, USD, today, BUY-1, ITM-50 10 at 30. Just save it.
Now approve the one I just created.

bot_must: recognise journey switch from PoCrt → PoApp
carry forward the PO number from turn 1 without re-asking
fire POAPPENTTRN1 (entry search) with that PO number

evaluation_metrics.context_carried_across_journeys: po_number from turn 1 used at turn 2 without re-asking
evaluation_metrics.two_distinct_trans: POCRTMAINSBT then POAPPMAINSBT (not the combined POCRTMAINTRN4)
